---
title: "Make Tables for Main Manuscript"
author: "Lauren Khoury and Kendra Wyant"
date: "`r lubridate::today()`"
number-sections: true
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true 
    toc_depth: 4
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 4
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
html-table-processing: none
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(kableExtra, exclude = ("group_rows"))

options(digits = 3)
options(knitr.kable.NA = '')

path_processed <- "\\\\research.drive.wisc.edu\\jjcurtin\\studydata\\cov\\data_processed"

table <- read_csv(here::here(path_processed, "estimate_tibble.csv"),
                  show_col_types = FALSE)

```

```{r}
footnote_methods <- "Screening models represent symbolic linear models where \\(Y\\) is the outcome, \\(X\\) is the focal independent variable, \\(C\\) is a covariate, and \\(k\\) is the number of covariates."

lm_methods <- tibble(
  Method = c(
    "No covariates",
    "All covariates",
    "p-hacking",
    "Separate cov lm with X",
    "Separate cov lm w/o X",
    "Simultaneous cov lm with X",
    "Simultaneous cov lm w/o X",
    "Simultaneous cov LASSO with X",
    "Simultaneous cov LASSO w/o X"
  ),
  `Screening Models` = c(
    "No screening models",
    "No screening models",
    "\\(Y \\sim X + C_{1}\\) <br> \\(Y \\sim X + C_{2}\\) <br> \\(\\vdots\\) <br> \\(Y \\sim X + C_{k}\\)",
    "\\(Y \\sim X + C_{1}\\) <br> \\(Y \\sim X + C_{2}\\) <br> \\(\\vdots\\) <br> \\(Y \\sim X + C_{k}\\)",
    "\\(Y \\sim C_{1}\\) <br> \\(Y \\sim C_{2}\\) <br> \\(\\vdots\\) <br> \\(Y \\sim C_{k}\\)",
    "\\(Y \\sim X + C_{1} + C_{2} + \\cdots + C_{k}\\)",
    "\\(Y \\sim C_{1} + C_{2} + \\cdots + C_{k}\\)",
    "\\(Y \\sim X + C_{1} + C_{2} + \\cdots + C_{k}\\) with \\(\\lambda\\) penalty applied to all covariates",
    "\\(Y \\sim C_{1} + C_{2} + \\cdots + C_{k}\\) with \\(\\lambda\\) penalty applied to all covariates"
  ),
  `Covariate Selection Criteria` = c(
    "No covariates used",
    "All covariates used",
    "Covariates that increase the effect of \\(X\\) are included in the final model",
    "Significant covariates (\\(p < .05\\)) when controlling for \\(X\\) are included in the final model",
    "Significant covariates (\\(p < .05\\)) are included in the final model",
    "Significant covariates (\\(p < .05\\)) when controlling for \\(X\\) and all other covariates are retained in the final model",
    "Significant covariates (\\(p < .05\\)) when controlling for all other covariates are included in the final model",
    "Covariates with non-zero coefficients are included in the model",
    "Covariates with non-zero coefficients are included in the model"
  )
)

```

```{r}
#| label: tbl-methods
#| tbl-cap: The nine covariate selection models and their definition for covariate selection.
#| warning: false

lm_methods |> 
  kbl(escape = FALSE, format = "html") |> 
  kable_classic() |> 
  kableExtra::footnote(general = footnote_methods, escape=FALSE)
```



```{r}
#| label: tbl-dictionary
#| tbl-cap: "Research context variables and values"
#| warning: false

data_tbl0 <- tibble(
  description = c(
    "The population parameter for the focal IV",
    "The sample size",
    "The number of covariates available",
    "The percentage of covariates with non-zero correlations with the outcome",
    "The magnitude of the correlation between the covariates and Y"),
  values = c("0, 0.2, 0.5",
             "50, 100, 150, 200, 300, 400", 
             "4, 8, 12, 16, 20", 
             "0.25, 0.50, 0.75",
             "0.3, 0.5" 
             )
)

data_tbl0 |>
  kbl(col.names = c("Research Context Variable", "Values"), 
      escape = FALSE,
      format = "html") |>
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped"), 
                full_width = FALSE) |>
  column_spec(1, width = "15em") |>
  column_spec(2, width = "10em")

```


```{r}
#| label: tbl-est
#| tbl-cap: "Mean estimates of effect size by method and population parameter."
#| warning: false

table |> 
  rename(Method = method, 
         `No effect ($\\beta_{x}=0$)` = `0`,
         `$\\beta_{x}=0.2$` = `0.2`,
         `$\\beta_{x}=0.5$` = `0.5`) |> 
  mutate(
    Method = factor(
      Method,
      levels = c("no_covs", "all_covs", "p_hacked", 
                 "r", "partial_r", 
                   "full_lm_wo_x", "full_lm",
                 "lasso",  "lasso_wo_x"),
      labels = c("No covariates", "All covariates", "p-hacking", 
                 "Separate cov lm with X", 
                 "Separate cov lm w/o X", 
                 "Simultaneous cov lm with X", 
                 "Simultaneous cov lm w/o X", 
                 "Simultaneous cov LASSO with X", 
                 "Simultaneous cov LASSO w/o X")
    )
  ) |> 
  mutate(across(-Method, ~sprintf("%.3f", abs(.)))) |> 
  arrange(Method) |> 
  add_row(Method = "Traditional Selection", .before = 1) |> 
  add_row(Method = "Data-driven Selection", .after = 3) |> 
  kable(escape = FALSE) |> 
  kable_classic() |> 
  pack_rows(NULL, 2, 3) |> 
  pack_rows(NULL, 5, 11)
```


```{r}
#| label: tbl-rec
#| tbl-cap: "Summary of selection methods, evaluation of bias and Type I and II error rates, and recommendations."
#| warning: false

tibble(
  Method = c(
    "No covariates",
    "All covariates",
    "p-hacking",
    "Separate cov lm with X",
    "Separate cov lm w/o X",
    "Simultaneous cov lm with X",
    "Simultaneous cov lm w/o X",
    "Simultaneous cov LASSO with X",
    "Simultaneous cov LASSO w/o X"
  ),
  `Bias` = c(
    "none",
    "none",
    "unacceptable",
    "none",
    "acceptable",
    "none",
    "acceptable",
    "none",
    "acceptable"
  ),
  `Type I error` = c(
    "0.050",
    "0.050",
    "0.198",
    "0.052",
    "0.050",
    "0.060",
    "0.050",
    "0.057",
    "0.050"
  ),
  `Type II error` = c(
    "0.449",
    "",
    "0.358",
    "0.341",
    "0.347",
    "0.345",
    "0.368",
    "0.337",
    "0.352"
  ),
  `Recommendation` = c(
    "",
    "",
    "",
    "",
    "",
    "",
    "",
    "",
    ""
  ),
  `Notes` = c(
    "",
    "",
    "",
    "",
    "",
    "",
    "",
    "",
    ""
  )
) |> 
  kbl(escape = FALSE, format = "html") |> 
  kable_classic() 
```
